s: In 1976, Rick Jones suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.360, WHIP 1.520, SO 45, WAR 1.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (BOS -> SEA).
In 1977, Rick Jones suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.100, WHIP 1.980, SO 16, WAR -0.800. Notable context: Joined SEA.
